name: stashwise
description: Search, save, and organize your personal Stashwise research from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Bring your saved research into every answer
interface.longDescription: Search your private Stashwise library and wiki, retrieve recent saves, preserve sourced research notes, and organize saved knowledge without leaving Codex.
defaultPrompt: What have I saved about this topic?
Save this research to my Stashwise library
